### Post by ribico on 2009-02-21
Dear friends,
I've recently bought an EeePC 1000H.
from the time I got it I installed eeebuntu NBR and tried to connect via my NOKIA 6230 mobile phone.

It seems to connect for a while and then it disconnect returning exit code 2.
here there's the log.. Could you help me ?

Thanks
